title: Homeshopa Plastic Waste Paper Basket Bin, Floral Retro Round Trash Can, Lightweight Recycling Rubbish Bin for Kitchen, Bedroom, Bathroom, Open-Top Garbage Dustbin, 7.7 Litre (Grey Leaf)
features: ENHANCE YOUR DECOR: These decorative waste paper bins are a delightful and functional way to brighten up any room. The waste bin makes a statement with its stylish and functional design that complements modern interiors; the classic round shape with beautiful floral pattern makes the wastebasket look elegant and stylish, and it could perfectly decorate your room.

QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This waste paper rubbish bin is made of high-quality plastic and has a silver trim at the top. This non-toxic plastic garbage can is lightweight, safe, shatterproof, and long-lasting. Because of its perfect flexibility and elasticity, it is difficult to deform or break under pressure.

OPEN TOP WITH STABLE BASE: This plastic garbage can has a round shape and a wide open mouth. A thicker base also prevents this trash can from tipping over or sliding on wet floors. The floral retro design and elegant colours of the waste basket make them suitable for a wide range of interior decorations.

EASY TO CLEAN: Give your home a new look! Place this round trash can wherever you want. Because heavy-duty plastic is durable and easy to clean, you can keep this trash can for a long time. Simply wipe it down with a soft cloth, warm water, and soap, and it will dry quickly and odourlessly.

FUNCTIONAL & VERSATILE: This waste basket bin may be used in a multitude of locations throughout your home, including the office, bedrooms, craft rooms, dens, and any other space that needs a small rubbish can. It is also perfect for RVs, campers, RV dorms, apartments, and condos.
